other_observers: Jesse White, Winston Lu, Jim Ward, Patricia Cullen, Eric DeFonso, many others.
description: Small mostly black goose (smaller than cackling) with all black head and white necklace. Dark breast with some lighter baring lower beast/side. White rump with dark tail feathers. On the outskirts of a group of Cackling Geese at the edge of open water on Thomas Reservoir. Occassionally resting, preening and eating snow/ice. Appeared to get bullied by Cackling Geese occassionally.
photographer: Photographer: Jeff Percell, Jeff Percell, Jeff Percell
